Tesco British Semi Skimmed Milk 2.272L, 4 Pints

£1.65

£0.73/litre

Description

Fresh pasteurised semi-skimmed British milk. A versatile everyday milk that is lower in fat than whole milk but still creamy and delicious.

Ingredients

INGREDIENTS: Pasteurised Semi-Skimmed Milk
